ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., AVALON) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the precinct is located */,
  "precinct_code" TEXT /* Code of the precinct */,
  "vbm_only" INTEGER /* Indicates if the precinct is vote by mail only */,
  "polling_place_name" TEXT /* Name of the polling place */,
  "polling_place_address" TEXT /* Address of the polling place */,
  "polling_place_hours" TEXT /* Hours of operation for the polling place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precincts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the voting method (e.g., POLLING PLACE, VBM PORTION) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the voting method */,
  "voting_instructions" TEXT /* Instructions for the voting method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party_affiliation" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "candidate_statement" TEXT /* Statement from the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting result */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct where the voting took place */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voting method used */,
  "serial_number" INTEGER /* Serial number of the voting result */,
  "ballot_group" INTEGER /* Ballot group number */,
  "registration_count" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters */,
  "ballots_cast" INTEGER /* Number of ballots cast */,
  "votes_for_candidate_id_1" INTEGER /* Votes for candidate with id 1 */,
  "votes_for_candidate_id_2" INTEGER /* Votes for candidate with id 2 */,
  "votes_for_candidate_id_3" INTEGER /* Votes for candidate with id 3 */,
  "num_under_votes" INTEGER /* Number of under votes */,
  "num_over_votes" INTEGER /* Number of over votes */,
  "spoiled_ballots" INTEGER /* Number of spoiled ballots */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_results_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_results_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES voting_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election official */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the election official */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the election official */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the election official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
